patch.value:
Nightly run 29442174590 (2026-07-15, dispatched post-PR#568 to verify the pm-0fhw/pm-b24b/pm-u5zr fixes): the previous seven failures are FIXED, but macos-latest/Node24 and windows-latest/Node24 both still fail on exactly ONE spec — tests/unit/extensions/extension-copy-safety.spec.ts > "moves staging outside a source that contains the configured temp directory" with SystemError EINVAL "cannot copy <source> to a subdirectory of self <source>/runtime/tmp/pm-extension-copy-*/extension" at copyExtensionDirectoryWithoutSelfNesting (src/sdk/extension/install-runtime.ts:159).

Root cause (third site of the pm-0fhw canonicalization-asymmetry class, exposed by PR#568's extraction into install-runtime.ts): in copyExtensionDirectoryWithoutSelfNesting, `canonicalSource` is realpath'd but `systemTempDirectory = path.resolve(temporaryDirectory)` is NOT canonicalized. On macOS the tmpdir is symlinked (/var/folders -> /private/var/folders), so when the configured temp directory lives INSIDE the source, `isPathWithinDirectory(canonicalSource, systemTempDirectory)` compares /private/var/... against /var/... and reports NOT-contained -> stagingBase stays the in-source temp dir -> mkdtemp creates the staging root inside the source -> fs.cp copies source into a subdirectory of itself -> EINVAL. Windows hits the same via 8.3 short-name/alternate path namespaces. Linux passes because /tmp is not a symlink, which is why PR CI stayed green.

Fix direction: canonicalize temporaryDirectory with the same realpath root-to-leaf fallback used by resolveCanonicalExtensionInstallDestination before the containment check (and keep the staging-base derivation on canonical paths). PRODUCT defect — never fix spec-side-only (gf6f/dprb/0fhw precedent); never file per-platform point patches, extend this item.

Leg status: with this fixed, both macOS/Node24 and windows/Node24 nightly legs should go fully green (b24b/u5zr/0fhw fixes verified passing in run 29442174590).
Nightly macOS+Windows red post-PR#568: staging-base selection compares realpath'd source against non-canonical temp dir — staging lands inside source, fs.cp EINVAL self-copy

copyExtensionDirectoryWithoutSelfNesting canonicalizes temporaryDirectory (realpath with root-to-leaf fallback, same helper as destination) before the staging-base containment check; extension-copy-safety.spec.ts 'moves staging outside a source that contains the configured temp directory' passes on macOS/Node24 and windows/Node24 nightly legs; no spec-side-only masking
